summary: The diff implements all four major requirements with reasonable completeness. REQ-1 (initialization fix), REQ-2 (Bond visual theme), REQ-3 (Die Hard default music), and REQ-4 (CSS/Tailwind theme tokens) are all addressed. A few minor gaps exist: the tailwind.config.js still uses darkMode class rather than enforcing dark-only mode, and the start screen component is referenced in CSS but not fully visible in the diff. The crosshair image is referenced in HUD.tsx but the asset is not added as a file. Overall coverage is strong.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure dark mode is the only mode — tailwind.config.js still uses darkMode: ['class'] which requires a class toggle rather than enforcing dark-only
missing_requirements.reason: REQ-4 states dark mode is the only mode. The tailwind.config.js uses class-based dark mode meaning light mode could still activate without the dark class on the HTML element. There is no evidence in the diff of forcing the dark class on html or removing light-mode variants.

hallucinated_features.description: The Tailwind fontFamily config maps sans to Cormorant Garamond (a serif font), overriding the default sans-serif stack with a serif font
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request asks for elegant serif or thin-weight sans-serif typography but does not request replacing the Tailwind sans font family with a serif font. This could cause unintended styling for components expecting a sans-serif base.

hallucinated_features.description: borderRadius set to 0px for all Tailwind variants (lg, md, sm, DEFAULT), enforcing fully square edges across all components
hallucinated_features.reason: While the Bond aesthetic is described as minimal and high-contrast, completely zeroing out all border radii for every component was not explicitly requested in the build requirements.
